overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a dirt path through open grasslands at night. The scene features a large snow-capped mountain in the distance, scattered trees, and a dark teal night sky with visible stars and a crescent moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the snow-capped mountain in the distance

entered.detail: large mountain with white snow peak visible against the dark sky
tall thin evergreen trees dotting the landscape
winding dirt path through the grassland
grassy fields with wildflowers on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night. A massive snow-capped mountain dominates the right side of the horizon, while scattered pine trees dot the left side of the landscape. The sky is dark teal with visible stars.

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn to look back at the path behind

agents.ego_description: rotating to face the opposite direction, revealing the crescent moon and castle ruins behind

entered.detail: thin curved moon visible in the night sky
dark silhouette of castle towers on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character turns around, revealing a crescent moon and distant castle ruins in the opposite direction. The camera orbits around the character, showing the front of the character and the landscape behind before turning back to the original direction.

events.description: passing white stone pillars marking the path boundary on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past ancient stone markers and fence posts

entered.detail: tall white stone markers with orange tops lining the right side of the path
broken wooden fence attached to the stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking forward along the trail, passing white stone pillars and wooden fence sections on the right side. The snow-capped mountain returns to view ahead, and the path continues through the grassy meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail section approaching dense woods

events.description: path enters denser tree cover with darker ambient lighting and enclosed feeling

agents.ego_description: walking into the darker wooded section of the trail with denser vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees creating a canopy over the path
overhead tree cover blocking portions of the night sky

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as the character enters a forested area. Dense trees line both sides of the path, creating a darker, more intimate atmosphere. The snow-capped mountain remains visible ahead through gaps in the canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through open nocturnal grasslands that gradually transition into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail under a starry teal sky, with a massive snow-capped mountain dominating the horizon and scattered pine trees to the left. As the character pauses, the camera orbits around them to reveal a crescent moon and distant castle ruins in the opposite direction before swinging back to the original path. The scene then opens back up as the character resumes their journey, passing white stone pillars and wooden fence sections while the mountain remains a focal point ahead. Finally, the landscape shifts as the trail enters a forested area, where dense trees line both sides of the path and create a darker atmosphere while the mountain peaks still glimmer through gaps in the canopy.
